name: scriptorium-dark
summary: A forbidden library or copying hall — desks lined beneath shelves of vile texts, each station lit by a single candle, ink-stained fingers and cracked bindings.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangular — desks lined along walls want length

primary_palette.note: copying hall — four scriveners' stations, shelves of source material
reading-chapel — standing lecterns in a shelf-walled room
forbidden research — the desk is where the notes go, the altar is where the answers come from

story_prompts: interrupted mid-copy — ink still wet on a half-finished page of forbidden text
the scribes are dead at their desks, the work went on without them
a cultist study hall — identical books on every shelf, all one title
a mad wizard's scriptorium where the books rewrite themselves
ruined library where the knowledge survived but the keepers didn't
anti_patterns: don't light it brightly — the mood is isolated pools of illumination
don't scatter books randomly on the floor without explanation
avoid overlapping with ritual-chamber — this is study, not invocation
